8	/-!
9	# Grassmannian affine charts
10	
11	This file contains the single blueprint-pinned declaration for the affine
12	charts of the Grassmannian scheme: `AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian.affineChart`.
13	
14	For `I ⊆ Fin r` with `#I = d`, the affine chart `U^I` of the Grassmannian
15	`Gr(d, r)` is the spectrum of the polynomial ring in the `d(r-d)` free matrix
16	entries — `Spec ℤ[x^I_{p,q}]_{q ∉ I}` — which is non-canonically isomorphic
17	to `𝔸^{d(r-d)}_ℤ`.
18	
19	Blueprint reference: `def:gr_affine_chart`
20	(`blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex`).
21	-/
22	
23	set_option autoImplicit false
24	
25	universe u
26	
27	open AlgebraicGeometry CategoryTheory
28	
29	namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian
30	
31	/- Blueprint: def:gr_affine_chart (chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex) -/
32	
33	/- Planner note:
34	   Blueprint `def:gr_affine_chart` (Nitsure §1, "Construction by gluing together
35	   affine patches"): for `I ⊆ {1..r}` with `#I = d`, `X^I` is the `d×r` matrix
36	   whose `I`-minor is the `d×d` identity and whose other `d(r-d)` entries are
37	   independent indeterminates `x^I_{p,q}` over ℤ. The affine chart is
38	   `U^I := Spec ℤ[X^I] = Spec (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)` —
39	   the spectrum of the polynomial ring on the `d(r-d)` free entries; non-canonically
40	   `≅ 𝔸^{d(r-d)}_ℤ`. The prover should build `affineChart` as
41	   `AlgebraicGeometry.Spec` of that `CommRingCat` (the MvPolynomial ring on the
42	   free-entry index type), via
43	   `MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q // q ∉ I}) ℤ` or an equivalent index of cardinality
44	   `d(r-d)`. -/
45	
46	/-- The **affine chart** `U^I` of the Grassmannian `Gr(d, r)` indexed by a
47	`d`-element subset `I : Finset (Fin r)`.
48	
49	Concretely `U^I = Spec ℤ[x^I_{p,q}]_{p : Fin d, q ∉ I}`, the spectrum of the
50	polynomial ring `MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ` in the `d(r-d)`
51	free entries of the standard matrix representative with `I`-minor equal to the
52	identity. This chart is non-canonically isomorphic to `𝔸^{d(r-d)}_ℤ`.
53	
54	The Grassmannian scheme is obtained by gluing the `Nat.choose r d` affine charts
55	`U^I` along the Plücker cocycle transition maps. -/
56	noncomputable def affineChart (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) : Scheme :=
57	  AlgebraicGeometry.Spec (CommRingCat.of (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ))
58	
59	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — Grassmannian transition maps
60	
61	The transition map `θ_{I,J}` of `def:gr_transition` is a Cramer-inverse computation
62	over the localised chart ring `R^I_J := ℤ[X^I, 1/P^I_J]`, followed by the universal
63	property of the away-localisation. We build it bottom-up over the chart ring
64	`R^I := MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ`, all elementary matrix algebra
65	over `ℤ`. The `d`-subset combinatorics are handled by the order isomorphism
66	`Finset.orderIsoOfFin : I.card = d → (Fin d ≃o ↥I)`.
67	
68	Blueprint references: `def:gr_universal_matrix`, `def:gr_minor_det`,
69	`def:gr_universal_minor`, `lem:gr_minorDet_unit`, `def:gr_universalMinorInv`,
70	`lem:gr_universalMinorInv_identities`, `def:gr_image_matrix`, `def:gr_transition_pre`
71	(`blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex`). -/
72	
73	/-- The **universal matrix** `X^I` (`def:gr_universal_matrix`): the `d × r` matrix
74	over the chart ring `R^I = MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q // q ∉ I}) ℤ` whose `I`-minor is the
75	`d × d` identity (read through the order iso `Fin d ≃o ↥I`) and whose remaining
76	`d(r-d)` entries are the free indeterminates `x^I_{p,q}` (`q ∉ I`). Project-local:
77	the universal point of the affine chart `affineChart d r I`. -/
78	noncomputable def universalMatrix (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
79	    Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) :=
80	  fun p q =>
81	    if h : q ∈ I then (if (I.orderIsoOfFin hI p : Fin r) = q then 1 else 0)
82	    else MvPolynomial.X (p, ⟨q, h⟩)
83	
84	/-- The **minor determinant** `P^I_J = det(X^I_J)` (`def:gr_minor_det`): the determinant
85	of the `d × d` submatrix of `universalMatrix d r I` whose columns are those indexed by
86	`J`, reindexed to `Fin d` via the order iso `Fin d ≃o ↥J`. Project-local: defines the
87	principal open `U^I_J = Spec R^I[1/P^I_J]`. -/
88	noncomputable def minorDet (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
89	    (hJ : J.card = d) : MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ :=
90	  ((universalMatrix d r I hI).submatrix id
91	    (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))).det
92	
93	/-- The **localised `J`-minor** `X^I_J` over `R^I_J` (`def:gr_universal_minor`): the
94	`J`-minor of `universalMatrix d r I` with entries pushed forward along the structure map
95	`R^I → R^I_J = Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J)`. Project-local. -/
96	noncomputable def universalMinor (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
97	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
98	    Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)) :=
99	  ((universalMatrix d r I hI).submatrix id
100	    (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))).map (algebraMap _ _)
101	
102	/-- The localised minor determinant is a unit (`lem:gr_minorDet_unit`): `det(X^I_J)` is the
103	image of `P^I_J` under the away-localisation structure map, hence a unit. Project-local. -/
104	theorem isUnit_det_universalMinor (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
105	    (hJ : J.card = d) : IsUnit (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ).det := by
106	  have h : (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ).det
107	      = (algebraMap _ (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ))) (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) :=
108	    (RingHom.map_det _ _).symm
109	  rw [h]
110	  exact IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit _
111	
112	/-- The **Cramer inverse** `(X^I_J)⁻¹` (`def:gr_universalMinorInv`): the Mathlib
113	nonsingular inverse of the localised `J`-minor. Its entries lie in `R^I_J` by Cramer's
114	rule. Project-local. -/
115	noncomputable def universalMinorInv (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
116	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
117	    Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)) :=
118	  (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ)⁻¹
119	
120	/-- The Cramer inverse is a two-sided inverse (`lem:gr_universalMinorInv_identities`):
121	since `det(X^I_J)` is a unit, `(X^I_J)⁻¹` is a genuine left and right inverse.
122	Project-local. -/
123	theorem universalMinorInv_mul_cancel (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
124	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
125	    universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ * universalMinor d r I J hI hJ = 1 ∧
126	    universalMinor d r I J hI hJ * universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ = 1 :=
127	  ⟨Matrix.nonsing_inv_mul _ (isUnit_det_universalMinor d r I J hI hJ),
128	   Matrix.mul_nonsing_inv _ (isUnit_det_universalMinor d r I J hI hJ)⟩
129	
130	/-- The **image matrix** `M = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I` (`def:gr_image_matrix`): the product of the
131	Cramer inverse with the universal matrix base-changed to `R^I_J`. Its entries are the
132	prospective images of the indeterminates `x^J_{p,q}` under `θ_{I,J}`. Project-local. -/
133	noncomputable def imageMatrix (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
134	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
135	    Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)) :=
136	  universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ * (universalMatrix d r I hI).map (algebraMap _ _)
137	
138	/-- The **pre-localisation hom** `θ̃_{I,J} : R^J → R^I_J` (`def:gr_transition_pre`): the
139	`ℤ`-algebra map out of the chart ring of `J` sending each free indeterminate `x^J_{p,q}`
140	to the `(p,q)`-entry of the image matrix `M = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I`. Project-local. -/
141	noncomputable def transitionPreMap (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
142	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
143	    MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ →ₐ[ℤ]
144	      Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) :=
145	  MvPolynomial.aeval (fun e => imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ e.1 e.2.1)
146	
147	/-- The `I`-minor of the universal matrix `X^I` is the `d × d` identity (`P^I_I = 1`
148	underlies `lem:gr_transition_self`): the `I`-columns of `X^I` read through the order iso
149	`Fin d ≃o ↥I` form the identity block. Project-local. -/
150	theorem universalMatrix_submatrix_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
151	    (universalMatrix d r I hI).submatrix id
152	      (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) = 1 := by
153	  ext p p'
154	  simp only [Matrix.submatrix_apply, id_eq, universalMatrix]
155	  rw [dif_pos (I.orderIsoOfFin hI p').2, Matrix.one_apply]
156	  have hiff : ((I.orderIsoOfFin hI p : Fin r) = (I.orderIsoOfFin hI p')) ↔ (p = p') := by
157	    rw [Subtype.coe_inj, EmbeddingLike.apply_eq_iff_eq]
158	  by_cases h : p = p'
159	  · rw [if_pos (hiff.mpr h), if_pos h]
160	  · rw [if_neg (hiff.not.mpr h), if_neg h]
161	
162	/-- Submatrix on the columns of a right matrix factor commutes with the product
163	(rows reindexed by `id`). Project-local helper: avoids a matrix-multiplication
164	instance-keying issue that blocks the generic `rw` of Mathlib's submatrix-mul lemmas. -/
165	private lemma mul_submatrix_col {d r : ℕ} {R : Type*} [CommRing R]
166	    (A : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) R) (B : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) R) (g : Fin d → Fin r) :
167	    (A * B).submatrix id g = A * B.submatrix id g := by
168	  ext i j; simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.submatrix_apply]
169	
170	/-- The `J`-minor of the image matrix `M = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I` is the identity: `M_J =
171	(X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I_J = 1` (`def:gr_image_matrix`, used in the cocycle/transition arguments).
172	Project-local. -/
173	theorem imageMatrix_submatrix_self (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
174	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
175	    (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).submatrix id
176	      (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r)) = 1 := by
177	  have h1 : (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).submatrix id
178	        (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))
179	      = universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ *
180	        (((universalMatrix d r I hI).map (algebraMap _ _)).submatrix id
181	          (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))) := mul_submatrix_col _ _ _
182	  rw [h1, Matrix.submatrix_map]
183	  exact (universalMinorInv_mul_cancel d r I J hI hJ).1
184	
185	/-- The `I`-minor of the image matrix `M = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I` is the Cramer inverse:
186	`M_I = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I_I = (X^I_J)⁻¹` (`def:gr_image_matrix`). Project-local. -/
187	theorem imageMatrix_submatrix_I (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
188	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
189	    (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).submatrix id
190	      (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) = universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ := by
191	  have h1 : (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).submatrix id
192	        (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))
193	      = universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ *
194	        (((universalMatrix d r I hI).map (algebraMap _ _)).submatrix id
195	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))) := mul_submatrix_col _ _ _
196	  rw [h1, Matrix.submatrix_map, universalMatrix_submatrix_self,
197	    Matrix.map_one _ (map_zero _) (map_one _), mul_one]
198	
199	/-- The pre-localisation hom realises the matrix formula `θ̃_{I,J}(X^J) = (X^I_J)⁻¹ X^I`:
200	applying `θ̃_{I,J}` entrywise to the universal matrix `X^J` yields the image matrix `M`
201	(`def:gr_transition_pre`, `def:gr_image_matrix`). Project-local. -/
202	theorem universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
203	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
204	    (universalMatrix d r J hJ).map (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ)
205	      = imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ := by
206	  ext p q
207	  simp only [Matrix.map_apply, universalMatrix]
208	  by_cases hq : q ∈ J
209	  · rw [dif_pos hq]
210	    set k := (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ).symm ⟨q, hq⟩ with hk
211	    have hqk : (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ k : Fin r) = q := by simp [hk]
212	    have himg : imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ p q = (1 : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) _) p k := by
213	      have e := congrFun (congrFun (imageMatrix_submatrix_self d r I J hI hJ) p) k
214	      rw [Matrix.submatrix_apply, id_eq] at e
215	      rw [← hqk]; exact e
216	    rw [himg, Matrix.one_apply, apply_ite (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ), map_one, map_zero]
217	    have hcond : ((J.orderIsoOfFin hJ p : Fin r) = q) ↔ (p = k) := by
218	      conv_lhs => rw [← hqk]
219	      rw [Subtype.coe_inj, EmbeddingLike.apply_eq_iff_eq]
220	    by_cases hpk : p = k
221	    · rw [if_pos (hcond.mpr hpk), if_pos hpk]
222	    · rw [if_neg (hcond.not.mpr hpk), if_neg hpk]
223	  · rw [dif_neg hq, transitionPreMap, MvPolynomial.aeval_X]
224	
225	/-- The pre-hom sends `P^J_I` to a unit (`lem:gr_transition_pre_unit`):
226	`θ̃_{I,J}(P^J_I) = det((X^I_J)⁻¹) = det(X^I_J)⁻¹ = 1/P^I_J`, a unit of `R^I_J`. This is the
227	hypothesis that lets `θ̃_{I,J}` extend along the away-localisation `R^J[1/P^J_I]`.
228	Project-local. -/
229	theorem isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
230	    (hJ : J.card = d) : IsUnit (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ (minorDet d r J I hJ hI)) := by
231	  have e1 : transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ (minorDet d r J I hJ hI)
232	      = (((universalMatrix d r J hJ).submatrix id
233	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))).map
234	            (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ)).det :=
235	    RingHom.map_det (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom _
236	  rw [e1, ← Matrix.submatrix_map, universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap, imageMatrix_submatrix_I]
237	  have hmul : (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ).det * (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ).det = 1 := by
238	    rw [← Matrix.det_mul, (universalMinorInv_mul_cancel d r I J hI hJ).1, Matrix.det_one]
239	  exact IsUnit.of_mul_eq_one _ hmul
240	
241	/-- The **transition map** `θ_{I,J} : R^J[1/P^J_I] → R^I[1/P^I_J]` (`def:gr_transition`):
242	the away-localisation lift of the pre-hom `θ̃_{I,J}` along `P^J_I`, available because
243	`θ̃_{I,J}(P^J_I)` is a unit (`isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet`). It is the comorphism of
244	the chart-overlap isomorphism `U^I_J → U^J_I`. Project-local. -/
245	noncomputable def transitionMap (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
246	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
247	    Localization.Away (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) →+* Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) :=
248	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (minorDet d r J I hJ hI)
249	    (g := (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
250	    (isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet d r I J hI hJ)
251	
252	/-- `θ_{I,I}` is the identity (`lem:gr_transition_self`): since `P^I_I = 1` the minor
253	`X^I_I = 1` is its own Cramer inverse, so the pre-hom is the structure map and its
254	away-localisation lift is the identity ring homomorphism. Project-local. -/
255	theorem transitionMap_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
256	    transitionMap d r I I hI hI = RingHom.id (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)) := by
257	  have hmin1 : universalMinor d r I I hI hI = 1 := by
258	    simp only [universalMinor, universalMatrix_submatrix_self]
259	    exact Matrix.map_one _ (map_zero _) (map_one _)
260	  have hinv1 : universalMinorInv d r I I hI hI = 1 := by
261	    simp only [universalMinorInv, hmin1]
262	    exact inv_one
263	  have himg : imageMatrix d r I I hI hI = (universalMatrix d r I hI).map (algebraMap _ _) := by
264	    rw [imageMatrix, hinv1]
265	    exact Matrix.one_mul _
266	  have hpre : (transitionPreMap d r I I hI hI).toRingHom
267	      = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
268	          (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)) := by
269	    apply MvPolynomial.ringHom_ext
270	    · intro n
271	      change transitionPreMap d r I I hI hI (MvPolynomial.C n) = algebraMap _ _ (MvPolynomial.C n)
272	      rw [transitionPreMap, MvPolynomial.aeval_C,
273	        IsScalarTower.algebraMap_apply ℤ (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
274	          (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)), MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq]
275	    · intro e
276	      change transitionPreMap d r I I hI hI (MvPolynomial.X e) = algebraMap _ _ (MvPolynomial.X e)
277	      rw [transitionPreMap, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, himg, Matrix.map_apply]
278	      congr 1
279	      rw [universalMatrix, dif_neg e.2.2]
280	  apply IsLocalization.ringHom_ext (Submonoid.powers (minorDet d r I I hI hI))
281	  simp only [transitionMap, IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp, RingHom.id_comp]
282	  exact hpre
283	
284	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — triple-overlap rings and the cocycle
285	
286	The cocycle condition `θ_{I,K} = θ_{I,J} ∘ θ_{J,K}` cannot be stated as a naive
287	composition of the landed `transitionMap`s: the codomain of `transitionMap d r J K`
288	(`R^J[1/P^J_K]`) differs from the domain of `transitionMap d r I J` (`R^J[1/P^J_I]`).
289	The identity therefore lives over the *triple-overlap* rings obtained by inverting BOTH
290	relevant minors in each chart ring:
291	`S_K := R^K[1/(P^K_I P^K_J)]`, `S_J := R^J[1/(P^J_I P^J_K)]`, `S_I := R^I[1/(P^I_J P^I_K)]`.
292	We build the localised transition maps `Θ_{I,J} : S_J →+* S_I`, `Θ_{J,K} : S_K →+* S_J`,
293	`Θ_{I,K} : S_K →+* S_I` over these rings and verify the cocycle.
294	
295	Blueprint reference: `lem:gr_cocycle` (`blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex`). -/
296	
297	/-- A ring homomorphism carries the nonsingular (Cramer) inverse to the nonsingular
298	inverse, provided the determinant is a unit. Project-local helper: Mathlib has no direct
299	`map`-`nonsingular inverse` compatibility lemma. -/
300	private lemma map_nonsing_inv {n : ℕ} {R S : Type*} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] (f : R →+* S)
301	    (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) R) (h : IsUnit A.det) :
302	    (A.map f)⁻¹ = A⁻¹.map f := by
303	  have hmul : (A.map f) * (A⁻¹.map f) = 1 := by
304	    rw [← Matrix.map_mul, Matrix.mul_nonsing_inv A h, Matrix.map_one f (map_zero f) (map_one f)]
305	  exact Matrix.inv_eq_right_inv hmul
306	
307	/-- Inclusion of the away-localisation at `x` into the away-localisation at `x * y`
308	(inverting the extra factor `y`). Project-local: the structure map of the triple overlap
309	relative to a double-localisation. -/
310	noncomputable def awayInclLeft {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
311	    Localization.Away x →+* Localization.Away (x * y) :=
312	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (S := Localization.Away x) x
313	    (g := algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)))
314	    (by
315	      have h : IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) (x * y)) :=
316	        IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit _
317	      rw [map_mul] at h
318	      exact isUnit_of_mul_isUnit_left h)
319	
320	/-- Inclusion of the away-localisation at `y` into the away-localisation at `x * y`
321	(inverting the extra factor `x`). Project-local. -/
322	noncomputable def awayInclRight {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
323	    Localization.Away y →+* Localization.Away (x * y) :=
324	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (S := Localization.Away y) y
325	    (g := algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)))
326	    (by
327	      have h : IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) (x * y)) :=
328	        IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit _
329	      rw [map_mul] at h
330	      exact isUnit_of_mul_isUnit_right h)
331	
332	/-- `awayInclLeft` is the canonical map over `R`: it intertwines the two structure maps.
333	Project-local. -/
334	lemma awayInclLeft_comp_algebraMap {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
335	    (awayInclLeft x y).comp (algebraMap R (Localization.Away x)) =
336	      algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) := by
337	  rw [awayInclLeft]; exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp x _
338	
339	/-- `awayInclRight` is the canonical map over `R`: it intertwines the two structure maps.
340	Project-local. -/
341	lemma awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
342	    (awayInclRight x y).comp (algebraMap R (Localization.Away y)) =
343	      algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) := by
344	  rw [awayInclRight]; exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp y _
345	
346	/-- The image of a general minor determinant `P^B_C` under the pre-localisation hom
347	`θ̃_{A,B}` is the determinant of the `C`-minor of the image matrix `M = (X^A_B)⁻¹ X^A`
348	(generalises the `C = A` computation underlying `lem:gr_transition_pre_unit`). Project-local. -/
349	theorem transitionPreMap_minorDet (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
350	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
351	    transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)
352	      = ((imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).submatrix id
353	          (fun j : Fin d => (K.orderIsoOfFin hK j : Fin r))).det := by
354	  have e1 : transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)
355	      = (((universalMatrix d r J hJ).submatrix id
356	          (fun j : Fin d => (K.orderIsoOfFin hK j : Fin r))).map
357	            (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ)).det :=
358	    RingHom.map_det (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom _
359	  rw [e1, ← Matrix.submatrix_map, universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap]
360	
361	/-- The "cross" minor `P^B_C` is sent by `θ̃_{A,B}`, then pushed into a double localisation
362	`D` (in which `P^A_C` is a unit), to a unit. Concretely
363	`θ̃_{A,B}(P^B_C) = det((X^A_B)⁻¹ X^A_C) = det((X^A_B)⁻¹) · P^A_C`, a product of two units
364	once `P^A_C` is inverted. This is the cross-factor input to each triple-overlap transition
365	lift. Project-local. -/
366	private lemma isUnit_incl_transitionPreMap_cross
367	    (d r : ℕ) (A B C : Finset (Fin r)) (hA : A.card = d) (hB : B.card = d) (hC : C.card = d)
368	    {D : Type*} [CommRing D] [Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ) D]
369	    (incl : Localization.Away (minorDet d r A B hA hB) →+* D)
370	    (hincl : incl.comp (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ)
371	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r A B hA hB)))
372	        = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ) D)
373	    (hunit : IsUnit (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ) D
374	        (minorDet d r A C hA hC))) :
375	    IsUnit (incl (transitionPreMap d r A B hA hB (minorDet d r B C hB hC))) := by
376	  have hsub : (imageMatrix d r A B hA hB).submatrix id
377	        (fun j : Fin d => (C.orderIsoOfFin hC j : Fin r))
378	      = universalMinorInv d r A B hA hB *
379	        (((universalMatrix d r A hA).map (algebraMap _ _)).submatrix id
380	          (fun j : Fin d => (C.orderIsoOfFin hC j : Fin r))) := mul_submatrix_col _ _ _
381	  rw [transitionPreMap_minorDet, hsub, Matrix.det_mul, map_mul]
382	  refine IsUnit.mul ?_ ?_
383	  · refine IsUnit.map incl ?_
384	    refine IsUnit.of_mul_eq_one (universalMinor d r A B hA hB).det ?_
385	    rw [← Matrix.det_mul, (universalMinorInv_mul_cancel d r A B hA hB).1, Matrix.det_one]
386	  · have hdet : (((universalMatrix d r A hA).map
387	            (algebraMap _ (Localization.Away (minorDet d r A B hA hB)))).submatrix id
388	            (fun j : Fin d => (C.orderIsoOfFin hC j : Fin r))).det
389	          = algebraMap _ (Localization.Away (minorDet d r A B hA hB)) (minorDet d r A C hA hC) := by
390	      rw [Matrix.submatrix_map]
391	      exact (RingHom.map_det _ _).symm
392	    rw [hdet]
393	    have hcomp : incl (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ)
394	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r A B hA hB)) (minorDet d r A C hA hC))
395	        = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ A}) ℤ) D (minorDet d r A C hA hC) :=
396	      RingHom.congr_fun hincl _
397	    rw [hcomp]
398	    exact hunit
399	
400	/-- The left factor of a product is a unit in the away-localisation at that product.
401	Project-local. -/
402	private lemma isUnit_algebraMap_away_left {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
403	    IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) x) := by
404	  have h : IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) (x * y)) :=
405	    IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit _
406	  rw [map_mul] at h
407	  exact isUnit_of_mul_isUnit_left h
408	
409	/-- The right factor of a product is a unit in the away-localisation at that product.
410	Project-local. -/
411	private lemma isUnit_algebraMap_away_right {R : Type*} [CommRing R] (x y : R) :
412	    IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) y) := by
413	  have h : IsUnit (algebraMap R (Localization.Away (x * y)) (x * y)) :=
414	    IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit _
415	  rw [map_mul] at h
416	  exact isUnit_of_mul_isUnit_right h
417	
418	/-- The triple-overlap transition map `Θ_{I,J} : S_J →+* S_I`, where
419	`S_J = R^J[1/(P^J_I P^J_K)]` and `S_I = R^I[1/(P^I_J P^I_K)]`: the away-localisation lift of
420	`θ̃_{I,J}` (post-composed into `S_I`) along the doubly-inverted minor `P^J_I P^J_K`.
421	Project-local. -/
422	noncomputable def cocycleΘIJ (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
423	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
424	    Localization.Away (minorDet d r J I hJ hI * minorDet d r J K hJ hK) →+*
425	      Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK) :=
426	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (minorDet d r J I hJ hI * minorDet d r J K hJ hK)
427	    (g := (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
428	            (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
429	    (by
430	      rw [map_mul]
431	      refine IsUnit.mul ?_ ?_
432	      · exact (isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet d r I J hI hJ).map
433	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
434	      · exact isUnit_incl_transitionPreMap_cross d r I J K hI hJ hK
435	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
436	          (awayInclLeft_comp_algebraMap _ _)
437	          (isUnit_algebraMap_away_right _ _))
438	
439	/-- The triple-overlap transition map `Θ_{J,K} : S_K →+* S_J`, where
440	`S_K = R^K[1/(P^K_I P^K_J)]` and `S_J = R^J[1/(P^J_I P^J_K)]`. Project-local. -/
441	noncomputable def cocycleΘJK (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
442	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
443	    Localization.Away (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ) →+*
444	      Localization.Away (minorDet d r J I hJ hI * minorDet d r J K hJ hK) :=
445	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ)
446	    (g := (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)).comp
447	            (transitionPreMap d r J K hJ hK).toRingHom)
448	    (by
449	      rw [map_mul]
450	      refine IsUnit.mul ?_ ?_
451	      · exact isUnit_incl_transitionPreMap_cross d r J K I hJ hK hI
452	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))
453	          (awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap _ _)
454	          (isUnit_algebraMap_away_left _ _)
455	      · exact (isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet d r J K hJ hK).map
456	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
457	
458	/-- The triple-overlap transition map `Θ_{I,K} : S_K →+* S_I`, where
459	`S_K = R^K[1/(P^K_I P^K_J)]` and `S_I = R^I[1/(P^I_J P^I_K)]`. Project-local. -/
460	noncomputable def cocycleΘIK (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
461	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
462	    Localization.Away (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ) →+*
463	      Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK) :=
464	  IsLocalization.Away.lift (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ)
465	    (g := (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
466	            (transitionPreMap d r I K hI hK).toRingHom)
467	    (by
468	      rw [map_mul]
469	      refine IsUnit.mul ?_ ?_
470	      · exact (isUnit_transitionPreMap_minorDet d r I K hI hK).map
471	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
472	      · exact isUnit_incl_transitionPreMap_cross d r I K J hI hK hJ
473	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
474	          (awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap _ _)
475	          (isUnit_algebraMap_away_left _ _))
476	
477	/-- Mapping a base-changed matrix through a further ring hom collapses to a single base change
478	when the homs compose correctly. Project-local helper. -/
479	private lemma map_map_eq_of_comp {m n : ℕ} {R A D : Type*} [CommRing R] [CommRing A] [CommRing D]
480	    (M : Matrix (Fin m) (Fin n) R) (f : R →+* A) (g : A →+* D) (h : R →+* D)
481	    (hcomp : g.comp f = h) : (M.map f).map g = M.map h := by
482	  rw [Matrix.map_map, ← RingHom.coe_comp, hcomp]
483	
484	/-- Mapping the image matrix `M = (X^I_X)⁻¹ X^I` through any ring hom `incl` lying over the
485	structure map `R^I → D` (i.e. `incl ∘ (R^I → R^I_X) = (R^I → D)`) yields `(Y_X)⁻¹ Y`, where
486	`Y := X^I` base-changed to `D`. The key reusable step in the cocycle computation. Project-local. -/
487	private lemma imageMatrix_map_eq (d r : ℕ) (I X : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
488	    (hX : X.card = d) {D : Type*} [CommRing D]
489	    [Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) D]
490	    (incl : Localization.Away (minorDet d r I X hI hX) →+* D)
491	    (hincl : incl.comp (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
492	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I X hI hX)))
493	        = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) D) :
494	    (imageMatrix d r I X hI hX).map incl
495	      = (((universalMatrix d r I hI).map
496	            (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) D)).submatrix id
497	          (fun j : Fin d => (X.orderIsoOfFin hX j : Fin r)))⁻¹ *
498	        (universalMatrix d r I hI).map
499	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) D) := by
500	  have hmm : (imageMatrix d r I X hI hX).map incl
501	      = (universalMinorInv d r I X hI hX).map incl
502	        * ((universalMatrix d r I hI).map
503	            (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
504	              (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I X hI hX)))).map incl := by
505	    rw [imageMatrix]; exact Matrix.map_mul
506	  rw [hmm, map_map_eq_of_comp _ _ _ _ hincl, universalMinorInv,
507	    ← map_nonsing_inv incl (universalMinor d r I X hI hX)
508	        (isUnit_det_universalMinor d r I X hI hX)]
509	  congr 1
510	  rw [universalMinor, map_map_eq_of_comp _ _ _ _ hincl, ← Matrix.submatrix_map]
511	
512	/-- Matrix cancellation `(B⁻¹ A)(A⁻¹ M) = B⁻¹ M` when `A` is invertible. Project-local helper
513	for the final step of the cocycle. -/
514	private lemma inv_mul_inv_mul_cancel {d e : ℕ} {R : Type*} [CommRing R]
515	    (A B : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) R) (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin e) R) (hA : IsUnit A.det) :
516	    (B⁻¹ * A) * (A⁻¹ * M) = B⁻¹ * M := by
517	  rw [Matrix.mul_assoc B⁻¹ A (A⁻¹ * M), ← Matrix.mul_assoc A A⁻¹ M,
518	    Matrix.mul_nonsing_inv A hA, Matrix.one_mul]
519	
520	/-- The central matrix identity behind the cocycle condition: over the triple-overlap ring
521	`S_I`, the image matrix `(X^I_K)⁻¹ X^I` of `θ_{I,K}` equals `θ_{I,J}` applied entrywise to the
522	image matrix `(X^J_K)⁻¹ X^J` of `θ_{J,K}`. Both reduce to `(Y_K)⁻¹ Y` with `Y = X^I` over
523	`S_I`. Project-local. -/
524	private lemma cocycle_imageMatrix_eq (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
525	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
526	    (imageMatrix d r I K hI hK).map
527	        (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
528	      = (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).map
529	          ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
530	            (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))) := by
531	  -- LHS = (Y_K)⁻¹ * Y, where `Y := X^I` over `S_I`.
532	  have hLHS := imageMatrix_map_eq d r I K hI hK
533	    (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
534	    (awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap _ _)
535	  -- `(imageMatrix I J).map (awayInclLeft …) = (Y_J)⁻¹ Y`.
536	  have hMJimg := imageMatrix_map_eq d r I J hI hJ
537	    (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
538	    (awayInclLeft_comp_algebraMap _ _)
539	  set Y := (universalMatrix d r I hI).map
540	      (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
541	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK))) with hY
542	  -- Unit facts for the two minors of `Y`.
543	  have hYJ : IsUnit (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))).det := by
544	    have e : (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r))).det
545	        = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
546	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK))
547	            (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) := by
548	      rw [hY, Matrix.submatrix_map]
549	      exact (RingHom.map_det _ _).symm
550	    rw [e]; exact isUnit_algebraMap_away_left _ _
551	  -- `M^J := θ_{I,J}(X^J) = (Y_J)⁻¹ Y` over `S_I`.
552	  have hχ : ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
553	        (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))).comp
554	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
555	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
556	      = (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
557	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom := by
558	    rw [RingHom.comp_assoc, awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap, cocycleΘIJ]
559	    exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp _ _
560	  have hMJ : (universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
561	        ((awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
562	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
563	      = (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r)))⁻¹ * Y := by
564	    have e1 : (universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
565	          ((awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
566	            (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
567	        = (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).map
568	            (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
569	      rw [← map_map_eq_of_comp (universalMatrix d r J hJ)
570	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom
571	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) _ rfl]
572	      congr 1
573	      exact universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ
574	    rw [e1, hMJimg]
575	  -- RHS = (M^J_K)⁻¹ M^J = (Y_K)⁻¹ Y.
576	  have hRHS : (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).map
577	        ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
578	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
579	      = (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (K.orderIsoOfFin hK j : Fin r)))⁻¹ * Y := by
580	    have hmm : (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).map
581	          ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
582	            (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
583	        = (universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK).map
584	            ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
585	              (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
586	          * ((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
587	              (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
588	                (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).map
589	                  ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
590	                    (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))) := by
591	      rw [imageMatrix]; exact Matrix.map_mul
592	    rw [hmm, map_map_eq_of_comp _ _ _ _ hχ, hMJ, universalMinorInv,
593	      ← map_nonsing_inv _ _ (isUnit_det_universalMinor d r J K hJ hK), universalMinor,
594	      map_map_eq_of_comp _ _ _ _ hχ, ← Matrix.submatrix_map, hMJ,
595	      mul_submatrix_col (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (J.orderIsoOfFin hJ j : Fin r)))⁻¹ Y
596	        (fun j : Fin d => (K.orderIsoOfFin hK j : Fin r)),
597	      Matrix.mul_inv_rev, Matrix.nonsing_inv_nonsing_inv _ hYJ,
598	      inv_mul_inv_mul_cancel _ _ _ hYJ]
599	  rw [hLHS, hRHS]
600	
601	/-- **Cocycle condition** (`lem:gr_cocycle`): over the triple overlap, the transition maps satisfy
602	`Θ_{I,K} = Θ_{I,J} ∘ Θ_{J,K}` as ring homs `S_K →+* S_I`. Together with `θ_{I,I} = id`
603	(`transitionMap_self`) this is the gluing datum for the Grassmannian charts. -/
604	theorem cocycleCondition (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
605	    (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
606	    cocycleΘIK d r I J K hI hJ hK
607	      = (cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp (cocycleΘJK d r I J K hI hJ hK) := by
608	  apply IsLocalization.ringHom_ext
609	    (Submonoid.powers (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ))
610	  have hIK : (cocycleΘIK d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
611	      (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ K}) ℤ)
612	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ)))
613	      = (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
614	          (transitionPreMap d r I K hI hK).toRingHom := by
615	    rw [cocycleΘIK]; exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp _ _
616	  have hJK : (cocycleΘJK d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
617	      (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ K}) ℤ)
618	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r K I hK hI * minorDet d r K J hK hJ)))
619	      = (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)).comp
620	          (transitionPreMap d r J K hJ hK).toRingHom := by
621	    rw [cocycleΘJK]; exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp _ _
622	  rw [hIK, RingHom.comp_assoc, hJK]
623	  apply MvPolynomial.ringHom_ext
624	  · intro n
625	    exact RingHom.congr_fun (RingHom.ext_int
626	      (((awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
627	        (transitionPreMap d r I K hI hK).toRingHom).comp MvPolynomial.C)
628	      (((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
629	        ((awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)).comp
630	          (transitionPreMap d r J K hJ hK).toRingHom)).comp MvPolynomial.C)) n
631	  · intro e
632	    have h := congrFun (congrFun (cocycle_imageMatrix_eq d r I J K hI hJ hK) e.1) e.2.1
633	    simpa [Matrix.map_apply, transitionPreMap, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, RingHom.comp_apply] using h

635	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — scheme-level charts and the glue data
636	
637	We assemble the affine charts (`affineChart`), their principal-open overlaps
638	`U^I_J = Spec R^I[1/P^I_J]`, the transition isomorphisms (`transitionMap`), and
639	the cocycle (`cocycleCondition`) into the data of
640	`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.GlueData`, whose `.glued` is the Grassmannian scheme
641	`Gr(d,r)` over `ℤ`.
642	
643	Blueprint reference: `def:gr_glued_scheme`
644	(`blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex`). -/
645	
646	/-- `P^I_I = 1`: the `I`-minor determinant of the universal matrix `X^I` is the
647	unit `1`, since `X^I_I` is the identity (`universalMatrix_submatrix_self`).
648	Project-local. -/
649	theorem minorDet_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
650	    minorDet d r I I hI hI = 1 := by
651	  rw [minorDet, universalMatrix_submatrix_self, Matrix.det_one]
652	
653	/-- The principal-open overlap `U^I_J = Spec R^I[1/P^I_J]` as a scheme: the affine
654	spectrum of the away-localisation of the chart ring `R^I` at the minor determinant
655	`P^I_J`. Project-local: the `V`-object of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
656	noncomputable def chartOverlap (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
657	    (hJ : J.card = d) : Scheme :=
658	  Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))
659	
660	/-- The canonical open immersion `U^I_J → U^I` of the principal open into the chart,
661	the comorphism of the structure map `R^I → R^I[1/P^I_J]`. Project-local: the `f`-field
662	of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
663	noncomputable def chartIncl (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
664	    (hJ : J.card = d) : chartOverlap d r I J hI hJ ⟶ affineChart d r I :=
665	  Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom
666	    (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
667	      (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ))))
668	
669	instance chartIncl_isOpenImmersion (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
670	    (hJ : J.card = d) : IsOpenImmersion (chartIncl d r I J hI hJ) :=
671	  inferInstanceAs (IsOpenImmersion (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom
672	    (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
673	      (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ))))))
674	
675	/-- The self-inclusion `U^I_I → U^I` is an isomorphism: since `P^I_I = 1`
676	(`minorDet_self`) the away-localisation is the identity, so its `Spec` is an iso.
677	Project-local: the `f_id`-field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
678	theorem chartIncl_self_isIso (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
679	    IsIso (chartIncl d r I I hI hI) := by
680	  have hx : IsUnit (minorDet d r I I hI hI) := by rw [minorDet_self]; exact isUnit_one
681	  have e : MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ ≃ₐ[_]
682	      Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI) :=
683	    IsLocalization.atUnit _ (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)) _ hx
684	  have hbij : Function.Bijective
685	      (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
686	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI))) := by
687	    have hfun : (⇑(algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
688	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)))) = ⇑e := by
689	      funext y; simp [← e.commutes y]
690	    rw [hfun]; exact e.bijective
691	  have : IsIso (CommRingCat.ofHom
692	      (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
693	        (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)))) :=
694	    (ConcreteCategory.isIso_iff_bijective _).mpr hbij
695	  change IsIso (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom
696	    (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
697	      (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)))))
698	  infer_instance
699	
700	/-- The scheme-level transition `U^I_J → U^J_I`, the comorphism (`Spec.map`) of the
701	ring transition map `θ_{I,J} : R^J[1/P^J_I] → R^I[1/P^I_J]`. Project-local: the
702	`t`-field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
703	noncomputable def chartTransition (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
704	    (hJ : J.card = d) : chartOverlap d r I J hI hJ ⟶ chartOverlap d r J I hJ hI :=
705	  Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (transitionMap d r I J hI hJ))
706	
707	/-- `t_{I,I} = id`: the self-transition is the identity, from `transitionMap_self`.
708	Project-local: the `t_id`-field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
709	theorem chartTransition_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
710	    chartTransition d r I I hI hI
711	      = CategoryTheory.CategoryStruct.id (chartOverlap d r I I hI hI) := by
712	  rw [chartTransition, transitionMap_self, CommRingCat.ofHom_id, Spec.map_id]
713	  rfl
714	
715	/-- The pullback of two principal-open inclusions
716	`Spec R[1/x] → Spec R ← Spec R[1/y]` is `Spec R[1/(xy)]`: combine `pullbackSpecIso`
717	(the pullback is `Spec` of the tensor product `R[1/x] ⊗_R R[1/y]`) with the
718	localisation identification `R[1/x] ⊗_R R[1/y] ≅ R[1/(xy)]`
719	(`IsLocalization.Away.mul'`, `IsLocalization.algEquiv`). Project-local helper for the
720	triple-overlap pullbacks of the Grassmannian glue data; stated over a general base ring
721	so its proof term carries the needed `IsScalarTower` instances (avoiding a typeclass
722	timeout over the heavy chart ring). -/
723	noncomputable def awayPullbackIso {A : Type*} [CommRing A] (x y : A) :
724	    Limits.pullback
725	        (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away x))))
726	        (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away y)))) ≅
727	      Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (x * y))) :=
728	  letI : IsLocalization.Away (x * y)
729	      (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y)) :=
730	    IsLocalization.Away.mul' (Localization.Away x) _ x y
731	  (pullbackSpecIso A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y)) ≪≫
732	    Scheme.Spec.mapIso
733	      ((IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
734	        (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
735	        (Localization.Away (x * y))).toRingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso).symm.op
736	
737	/-- The first leg of `awayPullbackIso` is the left away-inclusion: under the
738	identification `pullback ≅ Spec R[1/(xy)]`, the projection to `Spec R[1/x]` is
739	`Spec.map` of `awayInclLeft x y`. Project-local: the `pullback.fst`-compatibility
740	needed for the `t_fac` field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
741	theorem awayPullbackIso_inv_fst {A : Type*} [CommRing A] (x y : A) :
742	    (awayPullbackIso x y).inv ≫
743	        Limits.pullback.fst
744	          (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away x))))
745	          (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away y))))
746	      = Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (awayInclLeft x y)) := by
747	  letI : IsLocalization.Away (x * y)
748	      (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y)) :=
749	    IsLocalization.Away.mul' (Localization.Away x) _ x y
750	  rw [awayPullbackIso, Iso.trans_inv, Category.assoc, pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst,
751	    show (Scheme.Spec.mapIso ((IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
752	        (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
753	        (Localization.Away (x * y))).toRingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso).symm.op).inv
754	      = Spec.map ((IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
755	        (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
756	        (Localization.Away (x * y))).toRingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso).hom from rfl,
757	    ← Spec.map_comp]
758	  congr 1
759	  apply CommRingCat.hom_ext
760	  simp only [CommRingCat.hom_comp, CommRingCat.hom_ofHom, RingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso_hom]
761	  apply IsLocalization.ringHom_ext (Submonoid.powers x)
762	  ext w
763	  simp only [RingHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, awayInclLeft,
764	    Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeftRingHom_apply, IsLocalization.Away.lift_eq,
765	    ← Algebra.TensorProduct.algebraMap_apply]
766	  exact (IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
767	    (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
768	    (Localization.Away (x * y))).commutes w
769	
770	/-- The second leg of `awayPullbackIso` is the right away-inclusion: under the
771	identification `pullback ≅ Spec R[1/(xy)]`, the projection to `Spec R[1/y]` is
772	`Spec.map` of `awayInclRight x y`. Project-local: the `pullback.snd`-compatibility
773	needed for the `t_fac` field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
774	theorem awayPullbackIso_inv_snd {A : Type*} [CommRing A] (x y : A) :
775	    (awayPullbackIso x y).inv ≫
776	        Limits.pullback.snd
777	          (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away x))))
778	          (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap A (Localization.Away y))))
779	      = Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (awayInclRight x y)) := by
780	  letI : IsLocalization.Away (x * y)
781	      (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y)) :=
782	    IsLocalization.Away.mul' (Localization.Away x) _ x y
783	  rw [awayPullbackIso, Iso.trans_inv, Category.assoc, pullbackSpecIso_inv_snd,
784	    show (Scheme.Spec.mapIso ((IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
785	        (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
786	        (Localization.Away (x * y))).toRingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso).symm.op).inv
787	      = Spec.map ((IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
788	        (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
789	        (Localization.Away (x * y))).toRingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso).hom from rfl,
790	    ← Spec.map_comp]
791	  congr 1
792	  apply CommRingCat.hom_ext
793	  simp only [CommRingCat.hom_comp, CommRingCat.hom_ofHom, RingEquiv.toCommRingCatIso_hom]
794	  apply IsLocalization.ringHom_ext (Submonoid.powers y)
795	  ext w
796	  simp only [RingHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, awayInclRight,
797	    RingHom.coe_coe,
798	    Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, IsLocalization.Away.lift_eq]
799	  rw [show (1 : Localization.Away x) ⊗ₜ[A] (algebraMap A (Localization.Away y) w)
800	      = algebraMap A (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y)) w from by
801	        rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.algebraMap_apply, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one,
802	          Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one, TensorProduct.tmul_smul, TensorProduct.smul_tmul']]
803	  exact (IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers (x * y))
804	    (TensorProduct A (Localization.Away x) (Localization.Away y))
805	    (Localization.Away (x * y))).commutes w
806	
807	/-- The product-commutativity equivalence `R[1/(xy)] ≃+* R[1/(yx)]`: the two
808	away-localisations agree because `Submonoid.powers (x*y) = Submonoid.powers (y*x)`.
809	Project-local: resolves the product-order mismatch between `cocycleΘIJ` (domain
810	`R[1/(P^J_I · P^J_K)]`) and the target `awayPullbackIso` (codomain `R[1/(P^J_K · P^J_I)]`)
811	in the triple-overlap `t'`-field of the Grassmannian glue data. -/
812	noncomputable def awayMulCommEquiv {A : Type*} [CommRing A] (x y : A) :
813	    Localization.Away (x * y) ≃+* Localization.Away (y * x) := by
814	  haveI : IsLocalization.Away (y * x) (Localization.Away (x * y)) := by

8	/-!
9	# The Quot scheme: Quot-foundations layer
10	
11	This file packages the Quot-foundations layer of the
12	Grothendieck–Altman–Kleiman Quot-scheme construction. It introduces the
13	per-fiber Hilbert polynomial of a coherent sheaf, the Quot functor
14	`Quot^{Φ,L}_{E/X/S}` of `T`-flat coherent quotients, and the Grassmannian
15	*scheme* (Mathlib at the pinned commit carries only a linear-algebra
16	Grassmannian) together with its representability.
17	
18	The 4 blueprint-pinned declarations are:
19	
20	1. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.hilbertPolynomial` (def) — the
21	   **Hilbert polynomial function** `s ↦ Φ_{F,s} ∈ ℚ[λ]` of a coherent
22	   sheaf `F` on `X` over a finite-type `π : X ⟶ S` with respect to a
23	   line bundle `L`. Encoded as a function `S → Polynomial ℚ`.
24	
25	2. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.QuotFunctor` (def) — the **Quot
26	   functor** `Quot^{Φ,L}_{E/X/S} : (Sch/S)^op ⥤ Set` sending an
27	   `S`-scheme `T ⟶ S` to the set of equivalence classes
28	   `⟨F, q⟩` of pairs `(F, q)` with `F` a `T`-flat coherent sheaf on
29	   `X_T`, `q : E_T ↠ F` a surjection, and `F|_{X_t}` having Hilbert
30	   polynomial `Φ` at every `t ∈ T`.
31	
32	3. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Grassmannian` (def) — the
33	   **Grassmannian functor** `Grass(V, d) : (Sch/S)^op ⥤ Set` of
34	   rank-`d` quotients of a locally free `O_S`-module `V`.
35	
36	4. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Grassmannian.representable` (theorem)
37	   — the **representability of the Grassmannian** by a smooth projective
38	   `S`-scheme `Gr_S(V, d)` of relative dimension `d(r-d)`, equipped with
39	   the Plücker closed embedding into `ℙ_S(⋀^d V)`.
40	
41	## Note on type expressivity
42	
43	Following the project rule "Never weaken the type to dodge the proof",
44	each declaration carries a substantive, non-tautological type:
45	
46	- `hilbertPolynomial` returns `Polynomial ℚ` keyed by `s : S`, not
47	  `Unit`; the Hilbert polynomial is a non-trivial invariant of the
48	  coherent sheaf at the fiber over `s`.
49	- `QuotFunctor` and `Grassmannian` return contravariant functors into
50	  `Type u` — substantive presheaves of sets, not constant functors.
51	- `Grassmannian.representable` packages the
52	  `Functor.RepresentableBy` Yoneda-bijection structure: existence of a
53	  scheme `Y` together with a `RepresentableBy Y` witness — substantive
54	  content (a representable functor is determined by its representing
55	  object up to canonical isomorphism, and the witness is the data of
56	  that isomorphism family).
57	
58	## Mathlib status
59	
60	Mathlib (master `b80f227`) provides:
61	- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules` (the category `X.Modules`),
62	- `Scheme.Modules.pullback`, `Scheme.Modules.pushforward` (the
63	  pullback–pushforward adjunction at level `i = 0`),
64	- `CategoryTheory.Functor.RepresentableBy` for representable functors,
65	- `AlgebraicGeometry.LocallyOfFiniteType`, `AlgebraicGeometry.IsLocallyNoetherian`
66	  (morphism / object property predicates), and
67	- `Polynomial` for `ℚ[λ]`.
68	
69	Mathlib does NOT provide (at the pinned commit):
70	- a Grassmannian *scheme* (only a linear-algebra Grassmannian
71	  as a finite-rank-quotient variety),
72	- the Quot/Hilbert functor or its representability,
73	- Snapper's Lemma for the polynomial property of Euler characteristics.
74	
75	## References
76	
77	Blueprint: `blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex`. Source:
78	Nitsure, "Construction of Hilbert and Quot Schemes", §1 (FGA Explained
79	Ch. 5, arXiv:math/0504020 pp. 5–35); cf. Hartshorne III.5.2.
80	-/
81	
82	set_option autoImplicit false
83	
84	universe u
85	
86	open CategoryTheory Limits
87	
88	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
89	
90	namespace Scheme
91	
92	/-! ## §1. Hilbert polynomial of a coherent sheaf
93	
94	For a finite-type morphism `π : X ⟶ S` with `S` noetherian and a coherent
95	sheaf `F` on `X` whose schematic support is proper over `S` (here encoded
96	as plain `X.Modules` for the file-skeleton), the per-fiber Hilbert
97	polynomial is the function
98	
99	`s ↦ Φ_{F,s} ∈ ℚ[λ],   Φ_{F,s}(m) = χ(X_s, F|_{X_s} ⊗ L_s^{⊗m})`.
100	
101	Snapper's Lemma ensures this is a polynomial in `m`; the proof requires
102	graded-Euler-characteristic infrastructure and is not stated here.
103	
104	Blueprint reference: `def:hilbert_polynomial` (Nitsure §1; cf. Hartshorne
105	III.5.2). -/
106	
107	/-- The **Hilbert polynomial** of a coherent sheaf `F` on `X` over `S` at
108	the fiber over `s ∈ S` with respect to a line bundle `L` on `X`.
109	
110	Encoded as a function `s ↦ Φ_{F,s} ∈ ℚ[λ]`. The defining formula
111	
112	`Φ_{F,s}(m) = χ(X_s, F|_{X_s} ⊗ L_s^{⊗ m})
113	            = Σ_i (-1)^i dim_{κ(s)} H^i(X_s, F|_{X_s} ⊗ L_s^{⊗m})`
114	
115	is a polynomial in `m` by Snapper's Lemma; the polynomial coefficients
116	depend on `s` through the fiber `F|_{X_s}`. When `F` is `S`-flat the
117	function `s ↦ Φ_{F,s}` is locally constant on `S`.
118	
119	iter-177+: the body unfolds to the graded-Euler-characteristic
120	construction once `χ` of a coherent sheaf on a noetherian scheme +
121	Snapper's polynomial-eventually-property are in scope. For the iter-176
122	file-skeleton the body is a typed `sorry`. -/
123	noncomputable def hilbertPolynomial {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
124	    (_π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType _π] (_L _F : X.Modules) (_s : S) :
125	    Polynomial ℚ :=
126	  sorry
127	
128	/-! ## §2. The Quot functor
129	
130	The Quot functor `Quot^{Φ,L}_{E/X/S}` sends an `S`-scheme `T ⟶ S` to the
131	set of equivalence classes `⟨F, q⟩` of pairs `(F, q)` where
132	- `F` is a coherent sheaf on `X_T = X ×_S T` whose schematic support is
133	  proper over `T` and which is `T`-flat,
134	- `q : E_T ↠ F` is a surjective `O_{X_T}`-linear homomorphism,
135	- the fiberwise Hilbert polynomial of `F|_{X_t}` with respect to `L|_{X_t}`
136	  equals `Φ` at every `t ∈ T`.
137	
138	Two pairs `(F, q)` and `(F', q')` are equivalent iff `ker(q) = ker(q')`.
139	
140	The Hilbert scheme is the special case `E = O_X`:
141	`Hilb^{Φ,L}_{X/S} = Quot^{Φ,L}_{O_X/X/S}`.
142	
143	Blueprint reference: `def:quot_functor` (Nitsure §1; FGA Explained Ch. 5). -/
144	
145	/-- The **Quot functor** `Quot^{Φ,L}_{E/X/S}` of coherent quotients of `E`
146	on `X ×_S -` with Hilbert polynomial `Φ`.
147	
148	Encoded as a contravariant functor `(Over S)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Type u`, sending an
149	`S`-scheme `T → S` (i.e. an object of `Over S`) to the set of
150	equivalence classes `⟨F, q⟩` of pairs `(F, q)` of a `T`-flat coherent
151	sheaf `F` on `X ×_S T` with proper support and a surjection
152	`q : E_T ↠ F` whose fiberwise Hilbert polynomial is `Φ`, modulo
153	`ker(q) = ker(q')`. Functoriality is pullback of the quotient along
154	`X ×_S T' ⟶ X ×_S T`.
155	
156	iter-177+: the body packages the on-objects / on-morphisms data using the
157	`Scheme.Modules.pullback` bifunctor on the relative product
158	`X ×_S T`, with the equivalence relation `ker(q) = ker(q')` quotiented
159	out via `Setoid` / `Quotient`. For the iter-176 file-skeleton the body
160	is a typed `sorry`. -/
161	noncomputable def QuotFunctor {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
162	    (_π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType _π] (_L _E : X.Modules)
163	    (_Φ : Polynomial ℚ) :
164	    (Over S)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Type u :=
165	  sorry
166	
167	end Scheme
168	
169	/-! ## §3. The Grassmannian scheme
170	
171	Since Mathlib carries no Grassmannian *scheme*, we encode it here as a
172	contravariant functor on `Over S` together with a representability
173	statement. The construction proceeds by gluing `binom(r, d)` affine
174	charts `U^I ≅ A^{d(r-d)}_S` along the Plücker cocycle, yielding a smooth
175	projective `S`-scheme `Gr_S(V, d)` of relative dimension `d(r-d)`,
176	equipped with a tautological rank-`d` quotient
177	`π* V ↠ U` and the Plücker closed embedding into `ℙ_S(⋀^d V)`.
178	
179	Blueprint references: `def:grassmannian_scheme`,
180	`thm:grassmannian_representable` (Nitsure §1 Exercise (2),
181	"Construction of Grassmannian"; FGA Explained Ch. 5). -/
182	
183	namespace Scheme
184	
185	/-- The **Grassmannian functor** `Grass(V, d) : (Sch/S)^op ⥤ Set` of
186	rank-`d` quotients of a locally free `O_S`-module `V` of rank `r ≥ d`.
187	
188	Encoded as the functor sending an `S`-scheme `T → S` to the set of
189	equivalence classes `⟨F, q⟩` of pairs `(F, q)` with
190	`q : V_T ↠ F` a surjection of `O_T`-modules and `F` locally free of
191	rank `d`, modulo `ker(q) = ker(q')`. Concretely
192	`Grass(V, d) = Quot^{d, O_S}_{V/S/S}` (the Quot functor for `X = S`,
193	`E = V`, constant Hilbert polynomial `d`).
194	
195	iter-177+: the body re-exports `QuotFunctor (𝟙 S) (?) V Φ_d`, where
196	`Φ_d : Polynomial ℚ` is the constant polynomial `d`. For the iter-176
197	file-skeleton the body is a typed `sorry`. -/
198	noncomputable def Grassmannian {S : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
199	    (_V : S.Modules) (_d : ℕ) :
200	    (Over S)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Type u :=
201	  sorry
202	
203	/-- **Representability of the Grassmannian.**
204	
205	For a noetherian scheme `S`, a locally free `O_S`-module `V` of rank `r`,
206	and `1 ≤ d ≤ r`, the Grassmannian functor `Grass(V, d)` of
207	`Grassmannian` is representable by a smooth projective `S`-scheme
208	`Gr_S(V, d) ⟶ S` of relative dimension `d(r-d)`, equipped with a
209	tautological rank-`d` quotient `π* V ↠ U`. The determinant line bundle
210	`det(U)` is relatively very ample, giving a Plücker closed embedding
211	`Gr_S(V, d) ↪ ℙ_S(⋀^d V)`.
212	
213	We package the conclusion as the existence of a representing
214	`Y : Over S` together with a `Functor.RepresentableBy Y` witness for
215	`Grassmannian V d`; the additional projective / smooth / Plücker
216	structure is implicit in the construction and is iter-177+ refinement
217	work (once the proof body lands).
218	
219	iter-177+: the body follows Nitsure §1 "Construction of Grassmannian":
220	glue the `binom(r, d)` affine charts `U^I ≅ A^{d(r-d)}_S` along the
221	Plücker cocycle, verify separatedness via the diagonal cut, verify
222	properness by the DVR valuative criterion, build the tautological
223	quotient `U`, exhibit the Plücker embedding via the determinant line
224	bundle. For the iter-176 file-skeleton the body is a typed `sorry`. -/
225	theorem Grassmannian.representable {S : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
226	    (V : S.Modules) (d : ℕ) :
227	    ∃ (Y : Over S), Nonempty ((Grassmannian V d).RepresentableBy Y) := by
228	  sorry
229	
230	end Scheme
